classes.purpose: Structure facts, resolve evidence conflicts, and apply supported sources to the case
classes.content: INPS records and exports or captured page evidence; contracts, F24s, emails and scans; extracted text; page quotes; facts; timelines; official sources; calculation basis; draft findings and review decisions

boundaries_beyond_codex.destination: Current official public legal and INPS sources
boundaries_beyond_codex.purpose: Research the confirmed framework and verify material claims
boundaries_beyond_codex.content: Contribution issue, period, legal-research query and selected public source URLs; public queries exclude personal identifiers
controls: Use current official sources and record source reference, temporal role, retrieval time, and version note.
Keep external research queries free of personal identifiers and session secrets.

boundaries_beyond_codex.destination: One already-open, human-authenticated INPS tab through a loopback browser endpoint
boundaries_beyond_codex.purpose: Capture a read-only current-view snapshot when an official export is not used
boundaries_beyond_codex.content: Visible page text and screenshot received into the private local run folder; source URL and title are stored only as hashes
controls: Require separately verified portal-capture permission, access/profile/delegation authority, exact origin, scope, and approval record; user approval alone is insufficient.
Restrict attachment to loopback and an exact HTTPS inps.it origin.
Do not navigate, click, submit, download, read cookies or storage, save HTML, close the browser, or capture credentials and one-time codes.

boundaries_beyond_codex.purpose: Download missing OCR model weights before local recognition
boundaries_beyond_codex.content: Model-weight request and approval reference; no case documents or extracted case content
controls: Disabled by default and enabled only with both the download flag and a stable approval ID.
Only model weights cross the boundary; document recognition remains local.

security_controls.control: Evidence and generated artifacts remain in an access-restricted directory outside the repository.
The workflow never requests or stores SPID/CIE/CNS credentials, cookies, tokens, browser state, or one-time codes.
Portal exports and conditional captures are hash-bound and revalidated before review decisions are saved or applied.
